examples: He is a tyrant who knows no pity.
"Geppetto looks like a good man," added another, "but with boys he's a real tyrant."
Sin is a harsh tyrant in your life. But Christ not only died for our sins, he died to sin.
The quiet household is often more turbulent than the household of the tyrant or the drunkard.
National workplace expert and author of Tame Your Terrible Office Tyrant, Lynn Taylor, concurs.
